problem id: 1fe9b923
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10001011 -> 01000000
  11010110 -> 01000011
  00000001 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 10100001
  01100000 -> 00000000
  11110001 -> 00100000
  00100111 -> 10000000
  10100010 -> 01000000
  10101111 -> 11000010

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 00000001
